_instructions: Fill every field you can. null = unknown/skip. Units: cm and kg (or set units to 'imperial' and use inches/lbs). This file drives the body description in every avatar prompt — more precision here = fewer correction rounds in Phase 2.

eyes._note: Be specific (e.g. 'dark brown, nearly black') — eye color drift is a known avatar risk; this exact string goes into every prompt.

_distinctive_features_note: Moles, freckle patterns, asymmetries, glasses, piercings — anything the model must preserve rather than average away.
